case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. BAY AREA LIGHT WORKS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI BAY AREA LIGHT WORKS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2024 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF DENIED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ZOOM APPEARANCE; (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAR-05-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA LIGHT WORKS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA LIGHT WORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY AREA LIGHT WORKS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LINDY GALIMBA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
